name: Daily Slack Summary
description: Generate a daily todo and priorities summary and post it to a Slack channel

config.userPrompt:
Generate a brief daily standup-style Slack message from the todo items below.

Format (Slack markdown):
*Good morning, team!* :wave:

*Working on today:*
• <item 1>
• <item 2>
• <item 3>

*Blockers:* <none, or list them>

Rules:
- Maximum 5 items in "Working on today".
- Use Slack markdown (*bold*, _italic_, :emoji:).
- Keep it under 100 words total.
- Pick the most important items — ignore minor todos.

TODOS:
{{INPUT}}
